mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post(user_id, type, title, description, category, price, location, lost_found_time, lost_status, images, contact, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, report_count, collect_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{description}, #{category}, #{price}, #{location}, #{lostFoundTime}, #{lostStatus}, #{images}, #{contact}, #{status}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{reportCount}, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, type, title, description, category, price, location, lost_found_time, lost_status, images, contact, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, report_count, collect_count, create_time, update_time FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT id, user_id, type, title, description, category, price, location, lost_found_time, lost_status, images, contact, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, report_count, collect_count, create_time, update_time FROM post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id, type, title, description, category, price, location, lost_found_time, lost_status, images, contact, status, view_count, like_count, comment_count, report_count, collect_count, create_time, update_time FROM post WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, price = #{price}, location = #{location}, lost_found_time = #{lostFoundTime}, lost_status = #{lostStatus}, images = #{images}, contact = #{contact}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = CASE WHEN like_count > 0 THEN like_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = CASE WHEN comment_count > 0 THEN comment_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET report_count = report_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET collect_count = collect_count + 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET collect_count = CASE WHEN collect_count > 0 THEN collect_count - 1 ELSE 0 END, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
